title: When reviewing a peer’s draft, please use the following checklist:
content:
When reviewing a peer’s draft, please use the following checklist:
1. Thesis & Organization:
• Is the thesis statement clear and well-defined?
• Does the essay follow a logical structure?
• Are the main points supported by details?
2. Content & Clarity:
• Is the essay engaging and does it address the prompt effectively?
• Are transitions smooth between paragraphs?
• Is there sufficient evidence and explanation for key ideas?
3. Grammar & Style:
• Are there issues with grammar, punctuation, or spelling?
• Is the tone appropriate for the audience?
• Does the sentence structure vary appropriately?
4. APA/Formatting (if applicable):
• Are in-text citations and the reference page formatted correctly?
• Is there consistent use of APA style?
5. Overall Feedback:
• What is one strength of this draft?
• What is one area for improvement?
• Any additional suggestions or questions?
